top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Advance on Tech Rally, Yen Weakens: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia climbed for a second day as a rebound in chipmakers at the heart of the artificial intelligence boom offset concerns over rising oil prices after the renewed escalation in the US-Iran conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Gulf nation that became Iran’s softest target
top_signals.summary: Kuwait, still scarred by the 1990 Iraqi invasion, has been repeatedly attacked by Tehran and its allies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EUR/CNY: Why China’s Yuan Is Drawing Scrutiny in Europe, What It Means for Euro
top_signals.summary: The value of the yuan has become a flashpoint in trade relations between China and the European Union. Many EU policymakers and economists believe the currency is undervalued and a key driver of the bloc’s deepening trade deficit with the East Asian nation. That imbalance averaged about $1.1 billion a day in June.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Customs Modernisation
top_signals.summary: We welcome views on the future of international trade and the impacts of digitalised and modernised practices on the UK customs regime.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: Public sector finances bulletin
top_signals.summary: The public sector finances statistical bulletin.

top_signals.title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market
top_signals.summary: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.
